summary.runtime_note: A transient data-I/O stall is included in wall time and overall throughput. The optimization trajectory remained one continuous process with one run_start and no resume.

sanitization: Only public labels, basenames, sanitized resolved configuration, complete loss-event series, summaries, tokenizer checksums, and peak-memory fields are retained; internal paths, host identifiers, checkpoints, raw driver logs, and process identifiers are omitted.
